name: The Tee at Tradewater
address: 111 W Arch St Suite 101, Madisonville, KY 42431
about: The Tee at Tradewater is Madisonville, Kentucky's premier indoor golf simulator, located within Tradewater Brewing Company. The venue utilizes state-of-the-art Trackman overhead simulator technology, combining advanced golf precision with the comfort of a local brewery. It caters to all skill levels, offering a range of courses and practice scenarios alongside a selection of handcrafted beers, creating a relaxed and welcoming environment for golfers. The facility emphasizes community, providing a space where people can share their passion for the sport in a convivial setting, featuring various membership options and a focus on social golfing experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman iO simulator for highly accurate swing analysis and course simulation
Over 300 world-renowned virtual courses available for play and practice
Unique combination of premium golf technology and handcrafted craft beers from the brewery
Relaxed social atmosphere perfect for group outings and friendly competitions
Monthly memberships offering unlimited off-peak play and discounted peak-hour rates
Community-focused environment that brings golf enthusiasts together

food_and_drink.notes: Not mentioned in the provided content
Full bar service available with handcrafted beers from Tradewater Brewing Company

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead golf simulator offering cutting-edge experience with unparalleled accuracy
